goals: Search for existing memories about research on cryptographic solutions and socio-economic inequality
Store new research findings about cryptographic impact on inequality
Review all stored memories to verify research context is complete
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memories from storage

memories.content: Research finding about cryptographic solutions and inequality
Research finding about cryptographic solutions and inequality

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical. Prefers structured research workflows and values persistent context across research sessions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social economics and cryptographic solutions research but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Expects the assistant to handle memory management transparently.

end_condition: The user has searched for relevant memories, added new research context, verified their stored memories, and cleaned up any irrelevant entries. All research memory management goals are complete.
